## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short description. If it adds a cog, name the commands it introduces. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] ✨ feat — new feature/cog
- [ ] 🐛 fix — bug fix
- [ ] 📝 docs — documentation only
- [ ] ♻️ refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format .` pass
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (all cogs still load)
- [ ] New commands are registered in `INITIAL_EXTENSIONS` (if a new cog)
- [ ] README feature table updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated
